positive.note: Duckling inconsistency: 'between X and Y <date>' attaches the date only to Y (2-day span), while 'from X to Y <date>' attaches it to the whole interval. The port applies the date to the whole interval consistently (more correct); not replicating the 'between' quirk.

Duckling inconsistency: 'between X and Y <date>' attaches the date only to Y (2-day span), while 'from X to Y <date>' attaches it to the whole interval. The port applies the date to the whole interval consistently (more correct); not replicating the 'between' quirk.

positive.note: Duckling quirk: 'by tomorrow morning' resolves 'to' to TODAY noon, ignoring 'tomorrow' (by tomorrow / tomorrow morning both parse sanely alone). Not replicated.
